But my vacation from university isn't for another three months... "I know and that's the issue".

Right if I take the blue pill everything will return to normal right? "yeah" and if I don't ill stay as Amelia? "yeah".

Ok will let's see how this week works out and I'll still have to work you know...

It's only part time so only twice this week and it will give you time with your parents...
